notes: Debito Unificato 5% della Città di Napoli, Serie D, No. 20027. Capitale Nominale Lire 1,000. Bilingual Italian/French. Emission of L.It. 80,053,310. Naples, November 20, 1880. Stamped "Debito Nuovo Foglio" 1931–1975. New coupon sheet of 98 coupons valid July 1, 1931 to December 31, 1979 attached.

# Transcription

## Original (Italian):

**Header:**
Serie D — DEBITO UNIFICATO 5% DELLA CITTÀ DI NAPOLI — Capitale L. 1000

**Main Body:**
Su garanzia del R. Governo per il pagamento a termini della Legge 14 Maggio 1881, N° 198 (Serie 3°) e dal Regolamento approvato con R. Decreto 15 Ottobre 1881, N° 438 (Serie 3°).

CARTELLA AL PORTATORE N° 20027 / TITRE AU PORTEUR N° 20027

Emissione di L. It. 86,053,310 di Capitale, deliberata dal Consiglio Comunale di Napoli nelle tornate del 20 Ottobre, 3 e 0 novembre 1880, con approvazione della Deputazione Provinciale in data 5 dicembre 1880.

Capitale Nominales Lire MILLE / Capital Nominale MILLE fs It.

con la Rendita annua del 5 %, computabile dal 1° gennaio 1881, cui rate semestrali saranno pagate all'Estero al 1° luglio di ogni anno e volontariamente dalle cedole unite allo presente.

IL SINDACO / [Signature]

Napoli, 20 Novembre 1881

VISTO PER IL CONTROLLO E PER LA REGISTRAZIONE DEL TITOLO
IL DELEGATO GOVERNATIVO / [Signature]

**Attached Coupon Sheet Notice:**
Nuove foglie di 98 cedole, per gli interessi d'agosto 1 luglio a 31 dicembre 1979, attaccato al titolo al portatore Serie D n. 20.027

**Coupon Denominations (repeated):**
DEBITO UNIFICATO [various numbers: 198, 197, 196, 195, 194, 193, 192, 191, 190, 189, 188, 187, 186, 185]
DELLA CITTÀ DI NAPOLI
Cartella N° 20.027
Cedola di Lire Ventinique
Pagabile al 1° [Luglio/Gennaio] [various years: 1879, 1878, 1877, 1876]

## English Translation:

**Header:**
Series D — UNIFIED 5% DEBT OF THE CITY OF NAPLES — Capital L. 1000

**Main Body:**
Under the guarantee of the R. Government for payment according to the terms of the Law of 14 May 1881, N° 198 (Series 3°) and the Regulation approved by Royal Decree of 15 October 1881, N° 438 (Series 3°).

BEARER BOND N° 20027 / BEARER TITLE N° 20027

Emission of L. It. 86,053,310 of Capital, approved by the Municipal Council of Naples in the sessions of 20 October, 3 and [date] November 1880, with approval of the Provincial Deputation on 5 December 1880.

Nominal Capital One Thousand Lire / Nominal Capital One Thousand Lire

with the annual income of 5%, computable from 1 January 1881, the semi-annual payments of which shall be paid abroad on 1 July of each year and voluntarily from the coupons attached hereto.

THE MAYOR / [Signature]

Naples, 20 November 1881

SEEN FOR CONTROL AND FOR REGISTRATION OF THE TITLE
THE GOVERNMENTAL DELEGATE / [Signature]

**Attached Coupon Sheet Notice:**
New sheet of 98 coupons for interest from 1 July to 31 December 1979, attached to the bearer bond Series D no. 20.027

OF THE CITY OF NAPLES
Bond N° 20.027
Coupon of Twenty-five Lire

title: Council of Ottoman Public Debt, Provisional Receipt No. 6,951,240, 500 Livres Turques, 4% Unified Converted Ottoman Debt, Deutsche Bank Hamburg
description: Provisional bearer receipt (Recepisse Provisoire au Porteur) No. 6,951,240 issued by the Conseil de la Dette Publique Repartie de l'Ancien Empire Ottoman (Council of the Distributed Public Debt of the Former Ottoman Empire) for a nominal amount of 500 livres turques (Turkish pounds) from the 4% Emprunt Ottoman Dette Convertie Unifiee (4% Ottoman Unified Converted Debt), represented at Frs. 900 per Ltqs 22. Issued through Deutsche Bank und Disconto-Gesellschaft, Filiale Hamburg. Coupon receipts (also labeled Recepisse Provisoire au Porteur) attached at bottom. transcription:
# Transcription

## Original (French):

**CONSEIL DE LA DETTE PUBLIQUE RÉPARTIE DE L'ANCIEN EMPIRE OTTOMAN**

**RÉCÉPISSÉ PROVISOIRE AU PORTEUR N° 0,951,240**

Délivré contre remise d'une obligation unitaire d'un capital nominal de Frs. 500 ou £ 20 ou Ltqs. 22

**DE L'EMPRUNT OTTOMAN DETTE CONVERTIE UNIFIÉE 4°/o.**

Conformément à la décision en date du 9 Juin 1933 de la Commission pour la répartition du capital nominal de la Dette Publique de l'Ancien Empire Ottoman, créée en vertu de l'article 49 du Traité de Lausanne, le présent récépissé a été délivré, contre retrait de l'obligation suivante, par l'entreprise

**DEUTSCHE BANK UND DISCONTO-GESELLSCHAFT FILIALE HAMBURG**

Vu que la Turquie a fait l'objet d'une émission spéciale; que les quotas-parts de l'Italie (Dodécanèse), de la Palestine, de l'Irak et des États voisins, par suite de ces événements, à la date d'émission du présent récépissé, le capital nominal non amorti de l'emprunt suscité se trouve réduit aux montants spécifiés dans le tableau ci-dessous, lesquels correspondent aux États qui en sont les débiteurs à raison du change d'or.

**ÉTATS DÉBITEURS**

| État | Pourcentage % | Capital non amorti sur les 1,371,051 titres unitaires de l'émission primitive, à la date d'émission du présent récépissé | Capital non amorti de change d'or |
|------|---------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------|
| | | on £ | on Ltqs. | Frs. | on £ | on Ltqs. |
|GRÈCE|48.46|81,518.843|3,380.754|3,719.820|61.65|2.47|5.71|
|BULGARIE|13.39|18,340.996|549.768|804.221|9.96|0.39|0.94|
|ROUMANIE|18.03|24,719.814|1,130.034|1,301.639|13.50|0.54|1.24|
|ALBANIE|7.27|12,677.818|567.113|557.856|9.25|0.37|0.81|
|YOUGOSLAVIE (y compris la Caza de Maaan)|7.27|9,928.298|300.970|221.662|4.75|0.19|0.46|
|HERJAVON|3.18|5,468.183|273.409|196.828|4.04|0.16|0.39|
|ASSYRIE|0.98|192.285|6.092|5.701|0.11|0.01|0.01|
|CILICIE|0.09|6,867.498|78.089|395.622|0.32|0.01|0.02|
|NEDJI|0.43|[unclear]|7.759|53.100|0.34|0.01|0.02|
|TOTAL|100.—|174,422.227|6,976.388|7,674.578|127.92|5.00|5.60|

Ce récépissé provisoire est exclusivement émis pour constater les droits des porteurs des titres retirés de la circulation sur les États débiteurs de l'Emprunt Ottoman. Le Conseil de la Dette ne pourra procéder, par le moyen de ce récépissé, à l'amortissement du capital nominal à leur charge. Les opérations futures qui pourraient être effectuées au moyen du présent récépissé provisoire, en vue de l'application des Accords conclus avec les États qui le remplacent, seront portées à la connaissance du public par avis publiés par le Conseil de la Dette.

**POUR CONTRÔLE,**

Par Délégation du Conseil:

**POUR LE CONSEIL DE LA DETTE PUBLIQUE RÉPARTIE DE L'ANCIEN EMPIRE OTTOMAN,**

Le Président:

Paris, le 1er Octobre 1933.

[Signatures present but illegible]

---

## English Translation:

**COUNCIL OF THE PUBLIC DEBT DISTRIBUTED FROM THE FORMER OTTOMAN EMPIRE**

**PROVISIONAL BEARER RECEIPT No. 0,951,240**

Delivered in exchange for a unit bond of a nominal capital of Frs. 500 or £ 20 or Ltqs. 22

**OF THE OTTOMAN LOAN UNIFIED CONVERTED DEBT 4°/o.**

In accordance with the decision dated June 9, 1933 of the Commission for the distribution of the nominal capital of the Public Debt of the Former Ottoman Empire, established by virtue of Article 49 of the Treaty of Lausanne, the present receipt has been delivered, in exchange for withdrawal of the following bond, by the enterprise

**DEUTSCHE BANK UND DISCONTO-GESELLSCHAFT HAMBURG BRANCH**

Given that Turkey has been subject to a special issue; that the share-holdings of Italy (Dodecanese), Palestine, Iraq and neighboring States, as a result of these events, at the date of issuance of the present receipt, the unamortized nominal capital of the aforementioned loan is found to be reduced to the amounts specified in the table below, which correspond to the States which are the debtors thereof at the ratio of the gold exchange.

**DEBTOR STATES**

[Table with same structure and data as above]

This provisional receipt is issued exclusively to establish the rights of the holders of bonds withdrawn from circulation against the debtor States of the Ottoman Loan. The Debt Council will not be able to proceed, by means of this receipt, to amortize the nominal capital at their charge. Future operations that could be carried out by means of this provisional receipt, with a view to the application of the Agreements concluded with the States that it replaces, will be brought to the attention of the public through notices published by the Debt Council.

**FOR CONTROL,**

By Delegation of the Council:

**FOR THE COUNCIL OF THE PUBLIC DEBT DISTRIBUTED FROM THE FORMER OTTOMAN EMPIRE,**

The President:

Paris, October 1st, 1933.

---

## Notable Markings:

- **Serial Number:** 0,951,240 (appears multiple times throughout document)
- **Red Stamps:** Multiple official stamps reading "DEUTSCHEN FILIALE HAMBURG" and other institutional markings
- **Signatures:** Two handwritten signatures at bottom of main document (partially illegible)
- **Date:** Paris, 1er Octobre 1933 (October 1, 1933)
- **Attached Coupons:** Numbered 2 through 10 at bottom, each labeled "RÉCÉPISSÉ PROVISOIRE AU PORTEUR N° 0,951,240" with matching red stamps

# Document Transcription

## Original (French):

Ce Reçu devra être échangé avant le _______________
(Cette date sera à à mai ajoutée à trois mois sur la date de signature)

CONSEIL DE LA DETTE PUBLIQUE RÉPARTIE DE L'ANCIEN EMPIRE OTTOMAN

Reçu au Porteur N° 100.014

d'un montant nominal de { Ltqs 2.20
                         { £ 2.0.0
                         { Frs fr. 50.—

£ TROIS LIVRES STERLING _______________

Émis par le Conseil de la Dette Publique Répartie de l'Ancien Empire Ottoman, conformément aux dispositions de l'Article IV, paragraphe o, du Contrat intervenu à la date du 13 Juin 1928 entre le Gouvernement de la République Turque et les Représentants des porteurs de la Dette Publique Ottomane, ratifié par la Grande Assemblée Nationale de Turquie aux termes d'une loi votée le 1er Décembre 1928.

ÉCHANGEABLE

contre un Titre au Porteur de

Bons Représentatifs des Annuités Arriérées de la Dette Publique Ottomane "Série A" 1928

Faute d'échange dans un délai maximum d'un an à partir du jour de son émission, le présent Reçu sera prescrit au profit des États débiteurs.

Il appartient aux porteurs intéressés de se grouper en vue de présenter à l'échange des Reçus d'un montant total correspondant au montant nominal de Ltqs 22, ou £ 20, ou Frs fr. 500 des titres unitaires des Bons Représentatifs de la Série A.

Le présent Reçu n'est créé que pour les besoins de l'opération bancaire d'échange. Il ne saurait être considéré comme un titre de créance. Il n'est pas productif d'intérêt.

AMSTERDAM, le 22 APR. 1930

POUR LE CONSEIL DE LA DETTE PUBLIQUE RÉPARTIE
DE L'ANCIEN EMPIRE OTTOMAN :

Le Président,                        Pour | BANQUE DE PARIS ET DES PAYS-BAS
[signature]                          PAR PROCURATION
                                    [signature]

Receipt to Bearer No. 100,014

of a nominal amount of { Ltqs 2.20
                       { £ 2.0.0
                       { Frs fr. 50.—

THREE POUNDS STERLING _______________

Issued by the Council of the Distributed Public Debt of the Former Ottoman Empire, in accordance with the provisions of Article IV, paragraph o, of the Contract concluded on 13 June 1928 between the Government of the Turkish Republic and the Representatives of holders of Ottoman Public Debt, ratified by the Grand National Assembly of Turkey by law passed on 1 December 1928.

EXCHANGEABLE

against a Bearer Title of

Representative Bonds of Arrears of Annuities of the Ottoman Public Debt "Series A" 1928

In the absence of exchange within a maximum period of one year from the date of its issue, the present Receipt shall be forfeited for the benefit of the debtor States.

It is incumbent upon the interested bearers to group together in order to present for exchange Receipts of a total amount corresponding to the nominal amount of Ltqs 22, or £ 20, or Frs fr. 500 of the unit bonds of the Representative Bonds of Series A.

The present Receipt is created only for the purposes of the banking exchange operation. It cannot be considered as a debt security. It does not produce interest.

AMSTERDAM, 22 APR. 1930

FOR THE COUNCIL OF THE DISTRIBUTED PUBLIC DEBT
OF THE FORMER OTTOMAN EMPIRE:

The President,                        For | BANK OF PARIS AND THE NETHERLANDS
[signature]                          BY PROXY

Faute d'échange dans un délai maximum d'un an à partir du jour de son émission, le présent Reçu sera prescrit au profit des États débiteurs.

Il appartient aux porteurs intéressés de se grouper en vue de présenter à l'échange des Reçus d'un montant total correspondant au montant nominal de Ltqs 22, ou £ 20, ou Frs fr. 500 des titres unitaires des Bons Représentatifs de la Série A.

Le présent Reçu n'est créé que pour les besoins de l'opération bancaire d'échange. Il ne saurait être considéré comme un titre de créance. Il n'est pas productif d'intérêt.

AMSTERDAM le 22 AVR. 1930 — 19

Pour la BANQUE DE PARIS ET DES PAYS-BAS
(Siège de la Banque)
PAR PROCURATION

POUR LE CONSEIL DE LA DETTE PUBLIQUE RÉPARTIE
DE L'ANCIEN EMPIRE OTTOMAN

Le Président,

[Signature]                [Signature]                [Signature]

---

This Receipt must be exchanged before _______________
(This date must be indicated to the bearer by the signing Bank)

COUNCIL OF PUBLIC DEBT DISTRIBUTED OF THE FORMER OTTOMAN EMPIRE

Receipt to Bearer No. 125,515

of a nominal amount of { Ltqs 4.40
                       { £ 4.—
                       { Frs 100.—

Issued by the Council of Public Debt Distributed of the Former Ottoman Empire, in accordance with the provisions of Article IV, paragraph a) of the Contract entered into on June 13, 1928 between the Government of the Turkish Republic and the Representatives of Holders of Ottoman Public Debt, ratified by the Grand National Assembly of Turkey under the terms of a law voted on December 1, 1928.

EXCHANGEABLE

against a Bearer Title of

Representative Bonds of Arrears of Annuities of Ottoman Public Debt "Series A" 1928

In the event of failure to exchange within a maximum period of one year from the date of its issuance, the present Receipt shall be prescribed for the benefit of the debtor States.

It is incumbent upon the interested bearers to group together in order to present for exchange Receipts of a total amount corresponding to the nominal amount of Ltqs 22, or £ 20, or Frs 500 of the unit titles of the Representative Bonds of Series A.

The present Receipt is created only for the purposes of the banking operation of exchange. It cannot be considered as a credit title. It is not productive of interest.

AMSTERDAM April 22, 1930 — 19

For the BANK OF PARIS AND THE LOW COUNTRIES
(Bank Head Office)
BY PROXY

FOR THE COUNCIL OF PUBLIC DEBT DISTRIBUTED
OF THE FORMER OTTOMAN EMPIRE

The President,

La República del Perú pagará al Portador la cantidad de

**CIEN SOLES**

Felipe Masías

José Pérez Marianor

title: City of Warsaw, 4.5% Loan of 1931, No. 0038738, Fr. 284 / Zlot. 99.188 / Fr. suisses 57.666 Bearer Bond, Warsaw, 1931
description: Bearer bond (Obligation / Obligacja) of the City of Warsaw, Capital of Poland (Ville Capitale de Varsovie / Miasto Stoleczne Warszawy) for the 4.5% Loan of 1931 (Emprunt 4.5% 1931 de la Ville Capitale de Varsovie / 4.5% Pozyczki m. st. # Transcription

**CONVERSION OF THE EXTERNAL DEBT OF PORTUGAL,**
**UNDER THE DECREE OF 18th DECEMBER, 1852.**

---

**PROVISIONAL CERTIFICATE OF DEFERRED STOCK.**

---

No. [1463]                                                                                          [Date]

In conformity with Article 25th of the Regulations approved of by a Decree of Her Most Faithful Majesty the Queen of Portugal, under date of 23d March, 1853, by which the Financial Agency in London is authorised to carry out the Conversion of the External Funded Debt of Portugal, in pursuance of the previous Decree of 18th December, 1852:

This is to Certify THAT the HOLDER hereof is entitled to the Sum of

**Three Pounds** [amount in handwriting - illegible]

**THREE PER CENT. DEFERRED STOCK,** bearing Interest from the 1st of January, 1863, which Sum proceeds from the above Conversion.

---

This Certificate will be exchanged on presentation with others, making up a sufficient amount, for Bonds of any of the following Series, viz. £50, £100, £200, or £500, into which the said Stock is divided; and for any remaining Balance a fresh Certificate will be given.

---

FINANCIAL AGENT OF THE PORTUGUESE GOVERNMENT IN LONDON.

WHITING, LONDON.

# TRANSCRIPTION

[Top right handwriting]: "remis juillet 1903" / "Présent"

TITULO ESPECIAL SEM JURO
do
FUNDO EXTERNO PORTUGUEZ
5.ª SÉRIE

Emissão de 477.517 obrigações, especiais sem juro, amortizáveis se par por sorteio, em 198 semestres conforme a tabella inscrita no verso, quando o forem as obrigações do juro de 3 por cento da 4.ª série, que tiveram os mesmos numeros d'estes títulos especiaes sendo, 387.517 títulos da 1.ª obrigação n.º 1 a 387.517, 477.517 a 477.517 e 18.000 títulos de 5 obrigações cada uma, de 387.516 a 477.515

N.º 303:486

Réis 308000 — Libras 6-12-8 — Francos 166,67 — Marcos 135,34 — Florins 79,34

**OBRIGAÇÃO GERAL**

[Long block of legal text describing the terms of the bond, authorized by Portuguese Government decree of 11 May 1902, regarding external debt conversion. The text discusses amortization schedule, lottery system, and conditions of the obligation. Key passage begins:]

Tendo sido autorizado o Governo Portuguez, pela carta de lei de 11 de maio de 1902, a converter a divida externa, consolidada e amortizavel, em obrigações de juro nulo pelo prazo de 5 semestrcs, e devendo, em virtude d'esta lei, serem desta conversão convertidos em obrigações do juro de 3 por cento da 4.ª série...

[The text continues with extensive legal provisions regarding the Public Credit Board (Junta de Crédito Público), terms of amortization, and obligations of both the bondholder and the Portuguese state. Multiple paragraphs of dense legal language follow.]

At bottom of document:

[Signatures - two handwritten signatures visible]

O Ministro da Fazenda
[signature]

Os Membros da Junta do Crédito Publico
[signature]

**SPECIAL ZERO-INTEREST BOND
of the
PORTUGUESE EXTERNAL FUND
5TH SERIES**

Emission of 477,517 bonds, special zero-interest bonds, redeemable at par by lottery, over 198 semesters as per the table inscribed on the reverse, when the 3 percent interest bonds of the 4th series bearing the same numbers are redeemed, these special bonds being 387,517 bonds of the 1st obligation numbered 1 to 387,517, 477,517 to 477,517 and 18,000 bonds of 5 obligations each, from 387,516 to 477,515

No. 303:486

Réis 308,000 — Pounds 6-12-8 — Francos 166.67 — Marks 135.34 — Florins 79.34

creator: Hope en Comp.; Ketwich en Voombergh; Wed. W. Borski
notes: Certificaat van 6 per Cents Russische Fondsen in Bank-Assignatien / Certificat d'Inscription Russe à 6 pour Cent en Assignations de Banque. No. 1326, R° 1000 rubles. Inscribed in the Grand Livre at St. Petersburg. Managed by Hope en Comp., Ketwich en Voombergh, and Wed. W. Borski. Amsterdam, May 11, 1825. Bilingual Dutch/French. transcription:
# Transcription

**Original:**

CERTIFICAAT CERTIFICAT
Van 6 per Cents D'INSCRIPTION RUSSE
RUSSISCHE FONDSEN à 6 pour Cent
IN EN
Bank-Assignatien. Assignations de Banque.

No. 1326. R⁺ 1000:—

Houder dezes is geregtigd tot eene L'PORTEUR à droit à une In-
Inscriptie van DUIZEND ROEBELS scription de MILLE ROUBLES capital
6 per Cents Russische Fondsen, betaalbaar à 6 pour Cent, de la Dette publique ne
in BANK-ASSIGNATIEN, ingeschreven in Russe, payable en ASSIGNATIONS DE
het Sroef-Boek te St. Petersburg, ten BANQUE, inscrit sur le Srand-Livre à
name van het ADMINISTRATIE-KAN- St. Pétersbourg, au nom du BUREAU
TOOR, opgerigt te Amsterdam, onder D'ADMINISTRATION, établi à Am-
directie van sterdam, sous la direction de

HOPE EN COMP., HOPE ET COMP.,
KETWICH EN VOOMBERGH, KETWICH ET VOOMBERGH,
EN ET

Wed. W. BORSKI. Veuve W. BORSKI.
Waarvan de Interessen voor rekening Dont les Intérêts seront reçus pour
en risico van den HOUDER ontvangen en compte et risque du PORTEUR et payés
uitbetaald zullen worden op Soupert, in- contre la remise des Soupenr, suivant Art. 6
gevolge Art. 6 van het uitgegeven Berigt. du Prospectus.

De HOUDER van dit Certificaat zal Le PORTEUR de ce Certificat pourra
ten allen tyde geregtigd zijn de originele en tout temps réclamer L'INSCRIPTION
INSCRIPTIE terg te vorderen, tegen originale, contre restitution du Certificat,
teruggage van dit Certificaat, met de on- avec les Soupenr non échus y appartenans,
verschenen Soupenr, en het daarbij afgege- et la RECONNAISSANCE y annexée pour
ven BEWIS voor nieuwe COUPONS, en obtenir de nouveaux COUPONS, moyennant
tegen betaling van de onkosten, in Art. 10 le payement des frais, mentionnés dans
van het Berigt vermeld. l'Art. 10 du Prospectus.

Amsterdam, den 11 Julij 1825.

Gezien bij mij [signatures]

[illegible signature]
Notaris

Hierbij afgegeven Tien Halfjarige COUPONS, Delivré Dix COUPONS de Rentes de Six
tot ⅺ Julij 1829. Mois, jusques ⅺ Juillet 1829.

Geteekend door Signés par

[signature: Maenschauer]

---

## English Translation:

CERTIFICATE OF INSCRIPTION
Of 6 Percent Russian Funds in Bank Assignations / Inscription Certificate in Russian 6 Percent Bank Assignations

No. 1326. R⁺ 1000:—

The holder of this is entitled to an inscription of ONE THOUSAND RUBLES at 6 percent Russian Funds, payable in BANK ASSIGNATIONS, inscribed in the Debt-Book at St. Petersburg, in the name of the ADMINISTRATION OFFICE, established in Amsterdam, under the direction of

HOPE AND COMPANY,
KETWICH AND VOOMBERGH,
AND

Wed. W. BORSKI / Widow W. BORSKI

The interests are received and paid at the holder's/bearer's expense and risk on Coupons, according to Article 6 of the published Notice.

The HOLDER of this Certificate shall at all times be entitled to claim the original INSCRIPTION in return, against return of this Certificate with the matured Coupons, and shall receive PROOF for new COUPONS, and against payment of costs as mentioned in Article 10 of the Notice.

Amsterdam, 11 July 1825.

Ten Half-yearly COUPONS delivered, valid until 11 July 1829.

transcription:
# Transcription of Russian Imperial Government Lottery Bond

## Original Russian Text:

**Header:**
РАЗРЯДЬ ВТОРОЙ.

**Top denominations:**
200 [left and right corners]

**Serial information:**
Серія номеръ / 15800
Билетъ номеръ / 32

**Main title section:**
ГОСУДАРСТВЕННЫЙ
ВНУТРЕННИЙ 4½% ВЫИГРЫШНЫЙ ЗАЕМЬ 1917 ГОДА,
выпущенный на основании постановления Временного Правительства отъ 11-го Августа 1917 года.

БИЛЕТЪ
ВЬ ДВЕСТИ РУБЛЕЙ НАРИЦАТЕЛЬНЫХЪ
НА ПРЕДЪЯВИТЕЛЯ.

**Body text:**
Заемь сей внесень въ Государственную Долговую Книгу подъ названием "Государственный внутренний четырехъ съ половиной процентный выигрышный заемь 1917 года". Билеты сего займа нарицаютъ номиналь на предъявителя, достоинствомъ въ 200 рублей нарицательныхъ. Владелець настояшаго билета участвует въ займе суммою въ 200 рублей, приносящей четыре съ половиной процента въ годъ до полного погашения билета нарицаемъ на него выигрышемъ.

Доходъ по билетамъ второго раздвда уплачивается два раза въ годъ: 16 Июля и 16 Января по предъявлению билета и того купона при Операциях Государственного Банка, Казначействахъ и Отдвленияхъ Государственныхъ Кассъ.

Течение процентовъ по билетамъ начинается 16 Января 1918 года. Гараж выигрышей производится публично въ мвстахъ, нанимаемыхъ Министромъ Финансовъ, производства для настояшаго раздвла 16 Июля и 16 Января каждаго года.

Первый гараж выигрышей для второго раздвла займа назначается на 16 Июля 1918 года. Выплата выигрышей производится въ Кассирахъ и Отдвленяхъ Государственного Банка снизу три мвсяца послв тиража выигрышей, но предъявители осуждены на срокъ, въ которомъ палать выигрышъ на предъявляемомъ объекте, отлмость недостающихъ купоновъ будет удержана изъ суммы выигрыша.

Приносимый действительный доходъ по отчвтемъ 4½ % въ годъ, а равно улучиваемые по займе выигрыша, освобождаются панседею отъ сбора съ доходовъ отъ денежныхъ капиталовъ.

Отплата выигрышей производится по течение 90 дней, нанимаемый дня начала таковой уплаты, а купоновъ — по течение 10 лвтъ съ наступления по нимъ срока.

Билеты сего займа приватизпаются по правилах, опредвлваемыхъ на каждое полугодие Министромъ Финансовъ и публикуемыхъ черезъ Правительствующий Сенать, въ валюги: а) по казвнныхъ подрядахъ и поставкахъ, б) по обеспеченю таможенныхъ пошлинахъ.

**Signature section:**
Управляющий Государственной
Банхвалтеръ Коллегией Погашеніе Логова

[Signature: Яковлев]

**Final date:**
Сроквъ послвднаго купона 16 Января 1928 года.

---

## English Translation:

**Header:**
SECOND CLASS

**Top denominations:**
200 [left and right corners]

**Serial information:**
Series number / 15800
Ticket number / 32

**Main title section:**
STATE INTERNAL 4½% LOTTERY LOAN OF 1917,
issued on the basis of the resolution of the Provisional Government of 11 August 1917.

TICKET
FOR TWO HUNDRED RUBLES NOMINAL
TO BEARER.

**Body text:**
This loan is entered in the State Debt Book under the name "State Internal Four and One-Half Percent Lottery Loan of 1917". The tickets of this loan are called nominal in the amount of 200 rubles nominal. The holder of this ticket participates in the loan in the amount of 200 rubles, bearing four and one-half percent per annum until the complete repayment of the ticket as indicated by the lottery winnings.

Income on tickets of the second class is paid twice a year: 16 July and 16 January upon presentation of the ticket and its corresponding coupon at the operations of the State Bank, Treasury offices and branches of the State Treasuries.

The accrual of interest on tickets begins 16 January 1918. The drawing of prizes is conducted publicly in places hired by the Minister of Finance for conducting the lottery for this class on 16 July and 16 January of each year.

The first drawing of prizes for the second class of the loan is set for 16 July 1918. Payment of prizes is made in the cashiers and departments of the State Bank within three months following the drawing of prizes; however, claimants who have missed the deadline, in which the payment of the prize on the presented object, the deficiency of the missing coupons will be withheld from the amount of the winnings.

The yielded actual income of 4½% per annum, as well as improvements in the loan winnings, are exempted from the collection fee on income from monetary capitals.

Payment of winnings is made within 90 days, counted from the day of beginning of such payment, and coupons — within 10 years from the onset of their deadline.

The tickets of this loan are privatized according to rules determined for each half-year by the Minister of Finance and published through the Governing Senate, in which: a) according to state contracts and deliveries, b) according to the security of customs duties.

**Signature section:**
Managing State
Accountant of the College of Loan Repayment

[Signature: Yakovlev]

**Final date:**
Date of last coupon 16 January 1928.

---

- **Signature:** Yakovlev (handwritten)
- **Official stamps/seals:** Red circular stamps visible in lower portion (partially legible)
- **Decorative border:** Ornate orange/rust-colored frame with classical patterns
- **Central engraving:** Classical allegorical figure with cherubs (typical of Imperial Russian government securities)
- **Printing note:** "AMERICAN BANK NOTE COMPANY" visible at bottom (printer attribution)

transcription:
# Transcription of Imperial Russian Three Per Cent Loan 1859 Bond

**IMPERIAL RUSSIAN THREE PER CENT LOAN 1859.**
**ONE HUNDRED POUNDS STERLING**

Inscription in the Great Book of the Public Debt of Russia representing a Capital of **ONE HUNDRED Pounds Sterling**.

Entered the _______ Book _______ folio 1546

The bearer of this Inscription is entitled to an annual Interest of **THREE per CENT**, to be paid half-yearly in London, One Pound ten shillings on the **1st OCTOBER** and **1st NOVEMBER** and One Pound ten shillings on the **1st MAY** and **1st JUNE** by Messrs **J. Thomson, T. Bonar & Co.**, or at the option of the holder in Berlin by **Mr. F. Mart, Magnus in Thalers** at the rate of six and three quarter Thalers per Pound Sterling on the said dates.

Attached to this Inscription are half-yearly dividend warrants up to **18 APRIL 1869**, with a talon. After the expiration of that date new dividend warrants will be delivered in exchange for the talon.

Extract from the Regulations of the **IMPERIAL COMMISSION OF THE SINKING FUND** (Code of Russian laws Tom. XI edit. 1857.)

§. 89. The payment of interminable annuities by the State, as well as in times of war as of peace, without any distinction whatsoever, whether the creditor be of a friendly or of a hostile nation.

§. 90. If a foreigner, proprietor of an Inscription, shall die, the Inscriptions shall pass to his heirs, in the order of succession established by the laws of the country, of which he was a subject.

§. 91. Investments in the irredeemable funded debt, constituting the inviolable property of the depositor are exempt from all imposts whatsoever.

Extract of the **IMPERIAL UKASE** of the **20 March 1859**, addressed to the Minister of Finance.

For the amortization of this Loan a special sinking fund, to be kept separate from the other Loans, will be assigned to begin from the year 1859, which fund will form annually 1½ % of the capital of the Loan. On the closure of this fund, for the purpose of buying in the inscriptions at the exchange of the day. If the holder of an inscription of this Loan should wish to have the same repurchased at any time at such price as he may require, the inscription to the bearer will be then changed into an inscription in the name of the holder, without dividend warrants, and the interest due on such inscriptions will be paid at the **IMPERIAL COMMISSION OF THE SINKING FUND** at **St. Petersburg** every half year, at the period fixed here above.

Countersigned: **THOMSON, BONAR & CO.**
per pro. **F. MART MAGNUS,**
Contractors.

Director of the Commission [**signature - illegible**]

---

## Notable Markings:

- Serial number: **No. 41150** (appears three times on document)
- Denomination: **U.S. $100** (shown in decorative oval)
- Two Danish revenue stamps affixed to upper left (pink/red colored, denominations visible: "12 KRONER" and "30 ØRE")
- Ornamental borders throughout in classical engraved style
- Decorative corner elements and scroll work
- Handwritten folio reference: "1546"
- Signature of Director of the Commission (handwritten, illegible)
- Text indicates bond No. 41150

transcription:
# Bulgarian Government 5% Gold Loan of 1902 - Bond Certificate No. 008761

## Original Text (Multilingual Document):

**HEADER:**

КНЯЖЕСТВО БЪЛГАРІЯ
PRINCIPAUTÉ de BULGARIE

БЪЛГАРСКИЙ 5% ДЪРЖАВЕНЪ ЗАЕМЪ въ ЗЛАТО ОТЪ 1902 ГОДИНА.

Обезпечен, съ залогъ, на дъмантията círку тютюна,
уредъ по закона на 21-г юний 1902 г.

ПРЕДСТАВЛЕНИЕ ОТЪ 212,000 ОБЛИГАЦИИ

за сума суми отъ, позичилата 106,000,000 лв. золотомъ = 106,000,000 франка = 39,750,000 фунтъ = 85,860,000 германскихъ марка;
а от 4,197,600 лева-франц = 100,912,000 австр. корона = 100,912,000 австр. крона = 50,580,000 долл. скандич. корона.

Лихвата по номиналната или стойность вм. 50 години.

Заемъ съставлява прпо аккумулаціонне чрезъ 4 държаве и обществено специално и болгарското управителство, при което те българското управителство да прихожа от гл. данъка "Мургана".

ОБЛИГАЦИЯ НА ПРИНЦИПЕНella ОТЪ ПЕТСОТТИНЪ ЛЕВА ЗЛАТИ МЕТАЛНИ МОНЕТА

рубль 187·50 = германскаго марка 405 — франка специално 19.16 — австр. корона 476 — холнд. гульдена 240 — франка 500.

No. 008761

**FOUR COLUMN SECTION (French, Bulgarian, German, English):**

**Left Column - FRENCH:**
Emprunt de l'État Bulgare
5% Or 1902
GAGE SUR LES DROITS DES TABACS

Créé en vertu de la loi spéciale du 21 juin 1902, l'Obligation ci contre représente une part de l'Emprunt de l'État Bulgare de 100,000,000 de francs affectée à divers travaux d'utilité publique en Bulgarie.

Cette dernière est remboursable par amortissement durant une période de 50 ans.

L'intérêt et l'amortissement du capital sont garantis par le Gouvernement Princier de Bulgarie, et seront payés à Paris.

REPRÉSENTANT
212,000 OBLIGATIONS
PORTANT SUR EN TOTAL NOMINAL

de 106,000,000 leva
= 106,000,000 lev or
= 39,750,000 livres
= 85,860,000 marks

REMBOURSABLE AU PAIR EN 50 ANS

L'emprunt sera amorti dans les conditions suivantes:
Le tirage au sort aura lieu une fois par an, et les titres tirés au sort seront remboursés à la valeur nominale augmentée d'une prime.
Si un porteur ne demande pas le remboursement dans les délais fixés, les intérêts cesseront de courir à partir de la date du tirage au sort.

OBLIGATION
AU PORTEUR
**Cinq Cents Francs**
600 leva, ou 187.50 livres sterling = Mark 405 = F 19.16.0 — francs spéciaux 19.16.0 — couronne autrichienne 476 — florin hollandais 240 — francs 500.

**Second Column - BULGARIAN (Cyrillic):**
Българский Государственный
5% Заемъ на Злато 1902

ОБЕЗПЕЧЕН НА ВАРИЦАТОЧНЫЙ ТАУМЪ

ПРЕДСТАВЛЯЕТ
212,000 ОБЛИГАЦИИ
ЛИТЪ ВЪ ИЗ СУМЪ НАЛИЧНИ

de 106,000,000 leva
= 106,000,000 лв. золота
= 39,750,000 фунтъ
= 85,860,000 германскихъ марка

ОБЛИГАЦІА
НА ПРЕДЪЯВИТЕЛЯ

**пятьсот франков**
или 600 лева, или 187.50 фунтъ
= 405 германскаго марка = 19.16.0 австр. корона = 476 холнд. гульдена = 240 франка = 500.

**Third Column - GERMAN:**
Bulgarischer
Staatsanleihe 5% Gold-Anleihe von 1902
MIT VERPFÄNDUNG DER TABAKZÖLLE

RÜCKZAHLBAR ZUM KURSWERTH IN 50 JAHREN

REPRÄSENTANT
212,000 OBLIGATIONEN
LITRES BEI EIN NOMINAL LAUTEND IM BETRAGE

von 106,000,000 Lev Gold
= 106,000,000 Lev Gold
= 39,750,000 Pfund
= 85,860,000 Mark Gold

OBLIGATION
AUF DEN INHABER LAUTEND
**Fünfhundert Francs**
oder 600 Lev = 187.50 [illegible] = Mark 405 = F 19.16.0 — austral. Krone = 476 — holländischer Gulden = 240 — francs 500.

**Fourth Column - ENGLISH:**
Bulgarian Government 5%
GOLD LOAN OF 1902

SECURED ON TOBACCO DUTIES

REDEEMABLE AT PAR IN 50 YEARS

REPRESENTING
212,000 BONDS

OF A TOTAL NOMINAL AMOUNT OF

£ 106,000,000 leva
= 106,000,000 lev in gold
= 39,750,000 pounds
= £4,197,600 marks in gold = 100,912,000 British pounds
= 50,580,000 dollar Swedish crowns

BOND
TO BEARER

**Five hundred Francs**
or 600 leva = 187.50 [illegible] = mark 405 = F 19.16.0 — Austrian crowns = 476 — Holland florins = 240 — francs 500.

**BOTTOM SECTION:**

Парiж, le 1-er Janvier 1903.
Ministre du Finances.
(Le Ministre des Finances)

[Signature: M.K. Saraffy]

Начальник на Отдѣленіе
Министерства на Финанціата
(Le Chef de la Division du Ministère des Finances)

[Signature: Illegible]

Дозволъ
(L'Officiel du Gouvernement Princier de Bulgarie)

[Signature: J. Blommendal?]

**PRINTER'S MARK:**
IMPRIMERIE CHAIX, RUE BERGÈRE, 20, PARIS. — 12703 6-02 — Imp. Lahure.

---

## Notable Markings:

- **Serial Number:** No. 008761
- **Date:** Paris, 1st January 1903 (Parij, le 1-er Janvier 1903)
- **Signatures:** Three official signatures present:
  - Minister of Finance: M.K. Saraffy
  - Head of Finance Ministry Division: [signature partially illegible]
  - Official of Government: J. Blommendal (or similar)
- **Circular seal/crest:** Bulgarian coat of arms at top center
- **Seal/stamp:** Dark circular seal on left side (partially visible)
- **Ornamental borders:** Elaborate blue decorative frames and borders throughout
- **Document reference number:** 4/15/ (top right corner)

# Bulgarian Government 5% Gold Loan of 1902 – Page 2

## УСЛОВИЯ НА ЗАЙМА (CONDITIONS)

**Original (Russian):**

Облигациялн в том займе носят годовых доход есть пять на сотню, (5%). Этот установлен срок на период выплат с 1-1 Марта и 1-1 Сентября всяко повода, грубо публичного разоспя.

[Extended Russian text describing loan conditions - 5% annual interest, payment dates of March 1 and September 1, redemption terms, drawing procedures for repayment, and various administrative details regarding the loan management]

---

## CONDITIONS DE L'EMPRUNT (French)

Les Obligations de cet Emprunt portent intérêt à cinq pour cent (5%) par an. Les intérêts seront payables le 1er Mars et le 1er Septembre de chaque année...

[Extended French text with equivalent loan conditions]

---

## BEDINGUNGEN DER ANLEIHE (German)

Die Obligationen der gegenwärtigen Anleihe tragen Zinsen à fünf (5%) pro Jahr. Die Zinsen zahlbar am 1. März und am 1. September eines jeden Jahres...

[Extended German text with loan conditions]

---

## CONDITIONS OF THE LOAN (English)

The Bonds of this Loan shall bear interest at the per-centage of five per cent (5%) per annum. The interest shall be payable on the 1st of March and 1st of September of each year...

[Extended English text describing identical loan terms]

---

## ТАБЛИЦА ЗА ПОГАШЕНИЕ / TABLEAU D'AMORTISSEMENT / TILGUNGSPLAN / TABLE OF AMORTISATION

**Amortization Schedule with columns:**
- Date of Payment (Дата на плащането / Dates de Paiement / Tilgungstag / Date of Payment)
- Obligations Annulled (Облигации погасени / Amortissements / Getilgt / Amortisement)
- Interest (Лихви / Intérêt / Zinsen / Interest)

**Years covered: 1903–1953** (spanning 50 years)

Each entry contains:
- Month and year (1-14 Марта/Mars - March; 1-14 Септември/Sept - September)
- Number of bonds redeemed
- Interest amounts
- Cumulative totals

The table is presented in four parallel columns for each language, with values in gold francs.

**Final totals shown:**
- Total Bonds: 21,000
- Total Interest: 96,025

---

## Notable Markings:

No visible signatures, stamps, or serial numbers are evident on this interior page. The document features ornamental borders and is formatted as a multi-language official financial document typical of international loans of the early 20th century.

## TRANSCRIPTION

£25 | 4½% | £25

CHINESE IMPERIAL GOVERNMENT
GOLD LOAN 4½% OF 1898
KAISERLICH CHINESISCHE STAATSANLEIHE
IN GOLD VON 1898
IM NOMINALBETRAGE VON £16,000,000 STERLING

**Letter:** A
**Denomination:** £25

**Left Column Title:**
Bond for £25 Sterling.

**Right Column Title (Original):**
Obligation über £25 Sterling.

**Left Column Heading:**
Twenty five Pounds Sterling.

**Right Column Heading (Original):**
Fünfundzwanzig Pfund Sterling.

## ORIGINAL TEXT (German sections):

**Obligation über £25 Sterling.**

# Transcription of Chinese Imperial Government 4½% Gold Loan of 1898 Bond Document

## LEFT PAGE

### Extracts from the Agreement referred to in the Bond.

The Imperial Government of China authorizes the Chinese Imperial Railway Company and the Deutsche-Asiatische Bank to raise a loan for the amount of Sixtyfive million Gold Yuan for the purposes and on the terms following:

[The text continues with detailed financial terms and conditions regarding the loan management, security, and administrative procedures. Key provisions include:]

- The loan shall be issued in Bonds of £25 Sterling each
- Bonds will be issued in London, Berlin and other financial centers
- Interest at 4½% per annum, payable half-yearly
- The Chinese Government is bound thereby
- Various conditions regarding the management of the loan, including provisions for amortization
- Clauses protecting the interests of bondholders
- Specification that charges on mortgage shall be raised or created except as authorized
- The bonds shall be a first charge on the revenues of the Chinese Imperial Railway Company
- Provisions for additional security through Customs duties
- Details about the service of coupons and bonds

[The text is dense with legal and financial terminology typical of 19th-century bond documentation]

EXPOSITION COLONIALE
Internationale

de

SOIXANTE FRANCS
AU PORTEUR

Ce Bon, libéré de tout impôt à la charge du porteur, donne droit à Vingt Tickets d'Entrée à l'Exposition, d'une valeur de 3 fr. par ticket, et aux autres avantages énoncés ci-dessous.

Il participe à 12 Tirages comprenant 2.136 Lots, nets de tout impôt, pour 24.264.000 francs.

Vu au CRÉDIT FONCIER DE FRANCE :

International
PARIS
1931

of

LOTTERY BOND
OF

[Three signatures]

OUTBOUND

# TABLEAU DES TIRAGES ET DES LOTS

## Original:

**TABLEAU DES TIRAGES ET DES LOTS**

| DATES DES TIRAGES (1) | MONTANT DES LOTS PAR TIRAGE | TOTAL DES LOTS |
|---|---|---|
| 3 tirages en 1929 : 2 Avril, 1er Juillet, 1er Octobre. | 1 lot de 1.000.000 fr. . . . . . 1.000.000 fr. 1 lot de 500.000 fr. . . . . . 500.000 fr. 9 lots de 100.000 fr. . . . . 900.000 fr. | 12 lots de 1.000.000 fr. . . . 12.000.000 fr. 12 lots de 500.000 fr. . . . 6.000.000 fr. 98 lots de 100.000 fr. . . . 9.800.000 fr. |
| 5 tirages en 1930 : 9 Janvier, 1er Avril, 1er Juillet, 1er Septembre, 1er Décembre. | 2 lots de 50.000 fr. . . . . . 100.000 fr. 2 lots de 25.000 fr. . . . . . 50.000 fr. 25 lots de 1.000 fr. . . . . . 25.000 fr. | 24 lots de 50.000 fr. . . . 1.200.000 fr. 24 lots de 25.000 fr. . . . 600.000 fr. 300 lots de 1.000 fr. . . . . 300.000 fr. |
| 4 tirages en 1931 : 16 Février, 1er Mai, 18 Juillet, 1er Octobre. | 14 lots de 500 fr. . . . . . . 7.000 fr. 100 lots de 250 fr. . . . . . . 25.000 fr. | 328 lots de 500 fr. . . . . . 164.000 fr. 1.209 lots de 250 fr. . . . . 302.250 fr. |
| **12 tirages . . .** | **178 lots pour . . . 2.022.000 fr.** | **2.136 lots pour . . . . . . . 24.264.000 fr.** |

(1) La répartition des tirages par année pourra être modifiée suivant la date de l'omission après accord avec le Commissaire Général de l'Exposition et les établissements signataires de la Convention.

Le paiement des lots sera effectué contre remises des bons deux mois après le tirage.

Le tirage et le paiement des lots avront lieu par les soins et sous la responsabilité du Crédit Foncier de France.

Si, pour une cause quelconque, l'Exposition n'avait pas lieu, les Porteurs-auraient droit à la restitution du capital de 69 francs par bon, sans intérêt.

---

## AUTRES AVANTAGES ATTACHÉS AUX BONS

**(EXTRAIT DE LA CONVENTION APPROUVÉE PAR LA LOI DU 22 JUILLET 1927)**

**Art. 4.** — Les bons sont des bons à lot importé. Ils participent à 12 tirages comprenant 2.136 lots pour 24.264.000 francs, à savoir :

12 lots de 1.000.000 francs ; 12 lots de 500.000 francs ; 98 lots de 100.000 francs ; 24 lots de 50.000 francs ; 24 lots de 25.000 francs ; 300 lots de 1.000 francs ; 328 lots de 500 francs ; 1.209 lots de 250 francs.

[Text continues with detailed benefits including railway, maritime transport, and aviation discounts...]

**Art. 5.** — Le porteur du bon aura droit à 20 tickets d'entrée d'une valeur de 3 francs chacun qui seront attachés aux bons.

[Additional sections follow regarding transportation benefits and company listings]

---

## English translation:

**TABLE OF DRAWS AND PRIZES**

| DATE OF DRAWS (1) | AMOUNT OF PRIZES PER DRAW | TOTAL OF PRIZES |
|---|---|---|
| 3 draws in 1929: April 2, July 1, October 1. | 1 prize of 1,000,000 fr. . . . . . 1,000,000 fr. 1 prize of 500,000 fr. . . . . . 500,000 fr. 9 prizes of 100,000 fr. . . . . 900,000 fr. | 12 prizes of 1,000,000 fr. . . . 12,000,000 fr. 12 prizes of 500,000 fr. . . . 6,000,000 fr. 98 prizes of 100,000 fr. . . . 9,800,000 fr. |
| 5 draws in 1930: January 9, April 1, July 1, September 1, December 1. | 2 prizes of 50,000 fr. . . . . . 100,000 fr. 2 prizes of 25,000 fr. . . . . . 50,000 fr. 25 prizes of 1,000 fr. . . . . . 25,000 fr. | 24 prizes of 50,000 fr. . . . 1,200,000 fr. 24 prizes of 25,000 fr. . . . 600,000 fr. 300 prizes of 1,000 fr. . . . . 300,000 fr. |
| 4 draws in 1931: February 16, May 1, July 18, October 1. | 14 prizes of 500 fr. . . . . . . 7,000 fr. 100 prizes of 250 fr. . . . . . . 25,000 fr. | 328 prizes of 500 fr. . . . . . 164,000 fr. 1,209 prizes of 250 fr. . . . . 302,250 fr. |
| **12 draws . . .** | **178 prizes for . . . 2,022,000 fr.** | **2,136 prizes for . . . . . . . 24,264,000 fr.** |

(1) The distribution of draws by year may be modified according to the date of the Exhibition, after agreement with the General Commissioner of the Exposition and the signatory bodies of the Convention.

Payment of prizes will be made against return of bonds two months after the draw.

The draw and payment of prizes will be made by and under the responsibility of the Crédit Foncier de France.

If, for any reason whatsoever, the Exposition does not take place, Bond holders will be entitled to repayment of the capital of 69 francs per bond, without interest.

---

## OTHER ADVANTAGES ATTACHED TO THE BONDS

**(EXTRACT FROM THE CONVENTION APPROVED BY LAW OF JULY 22, 1927)**

**Article 4.** — The bonds are imported lottery bonds. They participate in 12 draws comprising 2,136 prizes totaling 24,264,000 francs, namely:

12 prizes of 1,000,000 francs; 12 prizes of 500,000 francs; 98 prizes of 100,000 francs; 24 prizes of 50,000 francs; 24 prizes of 25,000 francs; 300 prizes of 1,000 francs; 328 prizes of 500 francs; 1,209 prizes of 250 francs.

[Details regarding railway, maritime, and aviation travel benefits...]

[Additional articles regarding transportation companies and benefits...]

**[Header - partially visible at top]**
ГЛАВНОЕ ОБЩЕСТВО РОССИЙСКИХ ЖЕЛЕЗНЫХ ДОРОГ, ВЫСОЧАЙШЕМ УКАЗОМ, 26-го Ноября 1857 года

125 р.                                                                                    3%

ГЛАВНОЕ ОБЩЕСТВО РОССИЙСКИХ ЖЕЛѢЗНЫХ ДОРОГ,
Учреждённое ВЫСОЧАЙШЕМ Указом, 26-го Ноября 1857 года.

МѢСТОРЀЖЕНИЕ ОБЩЕСТВА ВЪ С.-ПЕТЕРБУРГЪ.

Основной капиталъ Общества по Уставу ВЫСОЧАЙШЕ утверждённому 3-го Ноября 1861 г.:
На капиталъ: 1,600,000 акций по 125 рублей сер. на 75,000,000 руб. сер.; по 1,000,000 облигаций; 1-го выпуска 70,000 облиг. 4 1/2 % на 50 р. на 35,000,000 р. с. (мет.);
2-го выпуска 19,877 облиг. 4 1/2 % на 125 руб. на 2,359,625 руб. с. (мет.).

ТРЕТІЙ ВЫПУСКЪ ОБЛИГАЦИЙ:
105,176 облигаций по 125 руб. сер. на 13,147,000 руб. сер. (металлических).

Выпускъ по паритетной цѣнѣ, производится посредством Российского Общества телеграфа, по течении 70 дн., 1 1/2 Года задача т. п., Полюе каждаго года. Лицами со 1/1 Ноября по 30 Декабря съ ѣхже способными по облигациях, получаемыхъ на общем предъявленіи.

Годовой доход составляетъ: 3 р. 75 с. = 6 р. 12 1/2 коп. сер. = 7 гульд. ф шот. и уплачивается по полугодіяно.

**ОБЛИГАЦИЯ ВЪ СТО ДВАДЦАТЬ ПЯТЬ РУБЛЕЙ СЕР МЕТАЛЛИЧЕСКИХ,
или 500 францъ. = 20 фунтъ. стерл. = 402 герм. марк. = 238 голл. гульд.**

№ 210979

[Followed by extensive terms and conditions in smaller text, with signature lines at bottom]

**Предсѣдатель** [signature]

**По поручению Совѣта** [signature]

GRAND RUSSIAN RAILWAY COMPANY, By Imperial Decree, November 26, 1857

125 r.                                                                                    3%

**GRAND RUSSIAN RAILWAY COMPANY,**
Established by Imperial Decree, November 26, 1857.

**HEADQUARTERS OF THE COMPANY IN ST. PETERSBURG.**

The Company's Capital according to the Charter approved by Imperial decree on November 3, 1861:
Capital consists of: 1,600,000 shares at 125 rubles in silver equivalent to 75,000,000 rubles in silver; and 1,000,000 bonds; First emission: 70,000 bonds at 4 1/2% on 50 rubles equivalent to 35,000,000 rubles in silver (metallic); Second emission: 19,877 bonds at 4 1/2% on 125 rubles equivalent to 2,359,625 rubles in silver (metallic).

**THIRD EMISSION OF BONDS:**
105,176 bonds at 125 rubles in silver equivalent to 13,147,000 rubles in silver (metallic).

Issued at parity price, distributed through the Russian Telegraph Company, over a period of 70 days, one and a half years from each date. Holders receive income from November 1 to December 30 as specified in the bond terms and conditions for general presentation.

Annual income: 3 rubles 75 kopeks = 6 rubles 12 1/2 kopeks in silver = 7 guilders, paid semi-annually.

**BOND FOR ONE HUNDRED TWENTY-FIVE RUBLES IN SILVER METALLIC,
or 500 francs = 20 pounds sterling = 402 German marks = 238 Dutch guilders.**

No. 210979

# Transcription of Grand Russian Railway Company 3% Bond (Third Emission)

## HEADER (Trilingual - French, German, English)

**Original French:**
Grande Société des Chemins de fer Russes, autorisée par Oukase Impérial du 3/15 Février 1857. Siège Social à St-Pétersbourg.

**Original German:**
Grosse Russische Eisenbahn-Gesellschaft, bewilligt durch Allerhöchsten Ukas vom 3/15 Februar 1857.

**Original English:**
Grand Russian Railway Company, established by Imperial Ukase of the 3/15 February 1857. Legal Seat of the Company at St-Petersburg.

---

## CAPITAL AND OBLIGATIONS DETAILS

**French Section:**
Capital social d'après les Statuts sanctionnés par Sa Majesté l'Empereur le 3/15 Novembre 1861:
- Notions: 600,000 à 125 rls. arg. pour 75,000,000 roubles argent (métal).
- Obligations: 1re émission 70,000—44/o, à 500 roubles pour 35,000,000 roubles argent (métal).
- 2e émission 18,877—4 o/o, à 125 roubles pour 2,359,625 roubles argent (métal).

**German Section:**
Capital, laut dem am 3/15 November 1861 Allerhöchst bestätigten Statuten:
- Aktien: 600,000 à 125 Rubel Silber = 75,000,000 Rubel Silber (Metall).
- Obligationen: 1. Emission 70,000—44/o, à 500 Rubel = 35,000,000 Rubel Silber (Metall).
- 2. Emission 18,877—4o/o, à 125 Rubel = 2,359,625 Rubel Silber (Metall).

**English Section:**
Capital according to the Statutes of the 3/15 November 1861:
- 75,000,000 Roubles Silver (metallic), in 600,000 Shares, of 125 Roubles Silver each.
- 35,000,000 Roubles Silver (metallic), in 70,000 Obligations, first emission, 44/o, for 500 Roubles Silver each.
- 2,359,625 Roubles Silver (metallic), in 18,877 Obligations, second emission, 4o/o, for 125 Roubles Silver each.

---

## THIRD EMISSION OF OBLIGATIONS (Trilingual Headers)

**Troisième émission d'obligations:** 105,176 obligations à 125 rls.argent pour 13,147,000 rls. argent (métal).

**Dritte Emission von Obligationen:** 13,147,000 Rubel Silber (Metall) in 105,176 Obligationen à 20 Rubel.

**Third emission of obligations:** 13,147,000 Roubles Silver, metallic, in 105,176 Obligations, of 20 Roubles each.

---

## INDIVIDUAL BOND INFORMATION (Trilingual)

**UNE OBLIGATION**
de cent vingt-cinq roubles métalliques, soit 500 Fr.—20 St.—402 marks d'Allemagne.—236 fl. de Hollande.
N°210979

**EINE OBLIGATION**
von Hunderf fünf und zwanzig Rubel Metall, oder 500 Fr.—20 St.—402 Reichmark—236 fl. Gulden.
N°210979

**ONE OBLIGATION**
of one hundred twenty-five roubles metallic, or 500 Fr.—20 Roubles St.—402 German Marks.—236 Roubles fl.
N°210979

---

## DETAILED TERMS AND CONDITIONS (Trilingual - French, German, English)

[Long passages of detailed legal and financial terms in three languages follow. Key sections include:]

**French Section (Original):**
Les porteurs d'obligations sont autorisés par Majestés l'Empereur,s 3/15 Novembre 1881, en vertus de la loi du 3/15 Novembre 1861, à jouir de tous les droits... [continues with detailed conditions regarding interest, amortization, payment procedures]

**German Section (Original):**
Die Inhaber der Obligationen sind durch den am 3. November 1881 Allerhöchst bestätigten Statuten und die Ministerial-Verordnung autorisiert, alle in dieser Urkunde ausgesagten Rechte auszuüben... [continues with German terms]

**English Section (Original):**
The holders of these obligations are authorized by His Imperial Majesty the 19 December 1880, with a fixed number of obligationees... [continues with English terms]

---

## AMORTIZATION/DRAWING TABLE

The document contains extensive numerical tables showing:
- Years (Jahr/Année/Year) from 1881-1950
- Annual drawings (Tirage)
- Outstanding obligations (Obligations)
- Remaining amounts (Reste Ausstehend/Reste)
- Various financial calculations

**Column Headers:**
- Jahr/Année/Year
- Tirage Obligationen/Tirage Obligationen/Drawing
- Jahrt/Obligationen/Roubles
- Reste Ausstehend/Reste Obligationen/Roubles Ausstehen

[Table contains detailed year-by-year data from 1881-1950]

---

## FOOTER INFORMATION

**Date:** St-Petersburg, le 3/15 Décembre 1880. À janvier 1881.
**Attestation:** Cet obligation est soumis à un tirage et déroulement par présent d'exigence.

---

## SUMMARY TABLE TOTALS

**Tabellak поглашения 105,176 obligations 3-го выпуска / Tabell d'amortissement de 105,176 obligations de la 3e émission:**

- Total Obligations: 105,176

transcription:
# Transcription of Province of Nova Scotia Government Redeemable Stock Certificate

**DOMINION OF CANADA**

No C1515                                                                No C1515

**Province of Nova Scotia**

**GOVERNMENT REDEEMABLE STOCK.**

**BEARING INTEREST AT 3½ PER CENT PER ANNUM.**

REDEEMABLE AT PAR IN LONDON ON 11TH JULY 1930. THE GOVERNMENT HAVING THE OPTION OF REDEEMING THE SAME AT ANY TIME AFTER ONE MONTH'S NOTICE BY ADVERTISEMENT IN THE TIMES NEWSPAPER, OR BY POST TO THE THEN STOCKHOLDERS AT THEIR REGISTERED ADDRESSES.

**£1000**

This is to Certify that the Bearer of this Certificate

is entitled to

**ONE THOUSAND POUNDS**

Province of Nova Scotia Government Redeemable Stock, with Interest thereon at the rate of £3 7/10 per cent per Annum, Commenceable at Same National Provincial Bank of England Limited.

THE REVENUE OF THE PROVINCE OF NOVA SCOTIA ALONE ARE HEREBY IN RESPECT OF THE STOCK AND THE DIVIDENDS THEREON, AND THE CONSOLIDATED FUND OF THE UNITED KINGDOM, AND THE CONSOLIDATED REVENUES OF HIS MAJESTY'S TREASURY ARE PLEDGED FOR THE PAYMENT OF THE STOCK OR OF THE DIVIDENDS THEREON, OR FOR ANY MATTER RELATING THERETO — 42 Geo. II, cap. 28, sec. 3.

**Countersigned for**

**THE NATIONAL PROVINCIAL BANK OF ENGLAND LIMITED.**

**Dated,** 17th October 1910

**Registrar**

This Certificate is transferable by delivery unless the name and address of the owner be registered with the Bank. When the coupons attached are exhausted a further supply may be obtained on lodgement of this certificate at the National Provincial Bank of England Limited, 112, Bishopsgate Street, London, E.C.

This certificate may be pledged as security in the manner prescribed by the Bank's conditions. When so pledged it must be left with the Bank.

---

- Serial number: No C1515 (appears twice, upper corners)
- Handwritten date: "17th October 1910"
- Handwritten signature and notation (lower right): Appears to be registrar's signature
- Stamp: "CANCELLED" (visible in purple/blue ink)
- Provincial coat of arms of Nova Scotia displayed prominently
- Eight coupon sections attached at bottom (numbered for interest payments at £17.10.0 each)
- Ornamental red/orange decorative border throughout
- Printed by The National Provincial Bank of England Limited

transcription:
# EXTRAITS DES STATUTS

## Original French Text:

**Art. 3.** — La Société a pour objet :
L'étude et l'exécution de travaux de Travaux généralement quelconques, en tous pays, spécialement dans l'Empire Chinois. Elle pourra notamment entreprendre l'établissement et l'exploitation de chemins de fer, de routes, de canaux, de ports, d'établissements agricoles, industriels ou commerciaux, l'extraction et le traitement des minerais, la création de scieries, de filatures, de tanneries, d'usines, l'établissement de banques, de maisons de commerce ou de change, l'exploitation de mines, de forêts ou de concessions quelconques en tous pays; en général, tous les travaux et opérations commerciales, industrielles ou financières que pourrait la compter la mise en valeur et l'exploitation des richesses naturelles de ces pays.

**Art. 5.** — Le capital social est fixé à [value], divisé en actions de [number] francs chacune.

Nul ne peut posséder plus de cent actions sans une autorisation spéciale accordée par l'Assemblée générale extraordinaire. Cette limite pourra être élevée ou supprimée par l'Assemblée générale extraordinaire convoquée à cet effet, conformément à l'article 36 ci-après.

[The document continues with detailed French legal text regarding company statutes, including articles about capital, shares, administration, and governance]

**Articles numbered** include provisions regarding:
- Share capital and division
- Shareholder meetings and voting rights
- Board of Directors composition and powers
- Administration procedures
- Dividend distribution
- Asset management
- Extraordinary general assemblies
- Amendment procedures

---

## English Translation:

**Art. 3.** — The Company is intended for:
The study and execution of works of a general nature in all countries, especially in the Chinese Empire. It may in particular undertake the establishment and operation of railways, roads, canals, ports, agricultural, industrial or commercial establishments, the extraction and treatment of minerals, the creation of sawmills, spinning mills, tanneries, factories, the establishment of banks, trading houses or exchange houses, the exploitation of mines, forests or concessions of any kind in all countries; in general, all commercial, industrial or financial works and operations that could contribute to the development and exploitation of the natural resources of these countries.

**Art. 5.** — The capital stock is fixed at [amount], divided into shares of [denomination] francs each.

No one may own more than one hundred shares without special authorization granted by an Extraordinary General Meeting. This limit may be raised or removed by an Extraordinary General Meeting convened for this purpose, in accordance with Article 36 below.

[Continues with detailed provisions on corporate governance, share transfers, shareholder rights, dividend payments, administrative procedures, and amendment processes]

---

## Notable Markings:

**Bottom Section:** 
Coupon stubs (息票) in Chinese characters reading "中法實業銀行息票" (Banque Industrielle de Chine dividend coupons) arranged in a grid pattern:
- Three rows of 5 coupons each
- Two additional coupons at bottom right
- Total of 17 coupon stubs visible

**Printer's mark (bottom):** [illegible - appears to be a publisher/printer attribution]

transcription:
# TRANSCRIPTION

## GARANTIE / GUARANTEES

**Original (French):**

La concession a pour objet la construction et l'exploitation des chemins de fer agricoles, a voie étroite a traction électrique ou a vapeur, dans les provinces de Charkich, Dakahlieh et Kaloubieh.

Les lignes concédées représentent actuellement 350 kilomètres environ.

Aux termes de l'article 5 de l'acte de concession du 31 mai 1896, le Gouvernement Égyptien garantit pour l'ensemble de toutes les lignes du Réseau concédé, une recette annuelle calculée a raison de livres sterling/tranches (£ 36) par kilomètre, et s'il s'engage a parfaire, jusqu'a concurrence de cette somme, toute insuffisance de ladite recette réelle réalisée dans une année pour atteindre le chiffre ci-dessus de £ 36 par kilomètre.

Le montant des recettes brutes, comprenant les recettes quelconques en bonne matière dues chemins de fer agricoles et leurs dépendances, après avoir été diminué du 90 /1, pour frais et dépenses d'entretien, dépublication et d'administration, a compris l'amortissement annuel en 90 ans du capital leur et miroisons paragraphe de l'article 2, constitue la recette nette des chemins de fer agricoles et de leurs dépendances pour l'application de la garantie mentionnée ci-dessus.

Le dit paragraphe prévoit en outre, pour chaque année de l'exercice de la concession, la mise en exploitation générale des lignes concédées et spécifiées a l'acte de concession (350 kilomètres), et a partir de la 1re mise en exploitation générale pour les lignes qui auraient été concédées ultérieurement au termes du même acte.

Audit paragraphe il est reçu en générale des lignes pour leur mise en exploitation générale sera par section de 25 kilomètres et la garantie commencera a s'en acquitter a partir pour chaque des sections au fur et a mesure de la mise en exploitation générale.

L'audit garantie sera payable dans le mois qui suivra clôt de la clôture de l'exercice financier de l'exploitation.

---

**English translation:**

The object of the concession is to build and work agricultural narrow gauge railways with either electric or steam traction, in the provinces of Charkich, Dakahlieh and Kaloubieh.

The conceded lines have at present a length of about 350 kilometres.

In accordance with article 5 of the Act of concession dated May 31, 1896, the Egyptian Government guarantees for the whole system of conceded lines, annual net receipts at the rate of thirty-six pounds sterling (£ 36) per kilometre and undertakes to supply, up to that amount, any deficiency in the said annual net receipts effected in the course of 13 months.

The amount of gross receipts, including various receipts of all kinds from the agricultural railways and their dependencies, after deducting 60/, for repairs etc., working and management expenses, including the annual sum to provide for the redemption in 90 years of the capital as per § 3 of article 2, constitutes the net receipts of the agricultural railways and their dependencies for the application of the above mentioned guarantees.

The said guarantee shall only from the commencement of the general working of the conceded lines mentioned in article 1 of the Act of concession (350 kilometres) and from the date of the general working of the lines which may hereafter be conceded in conformity with this said article.

The examination of the lines previous to their general working shall be proceeded with, by sections of 25 kilometres, and the guarantee shall be available from the date of such examination for each of the sections respectively at their general working commences.

The said guarantee shall be payable in the course of the month following that closing the financial year of the working.

---

title: Gräflich Casimir Esterhazy'sche Central-Casse – Partial-Schuldverschreibung 20 Gulden, No. 14725 (1847)
description: Partial bond certificate (Partial-Schuldverschreibung) for twenty guilders (Zwanzig Gulden Conventions-Münze im 20 fl. Fusse), No. 14725, issued by the Gräflich Casimir Esterhazy'sche Central-Casse (Count Casimir Esterházy's Central Cashbox). Part of a bond issue of one million guilders bearing interest at 5%, drawn by lottery (Auslosungen) over 25 years. Repayment recapitulation table printed above the bond face. Text in German. Page 1 of 2.
creator: Gräflich Casimir Esterhazy'sche Central-Casse
notes: Partial-Schuldverschreibung (partial bond certificate), 20 Gulden Conventions-Münze; loan of 1,000,000 guilden issued against estate of Count Casimir Esterhazy von Galantha; managed by banking house Hammer & Koch; with lottery repayment recapitulation table; No. 14,725
transcription:
# Transcription

## Original (German):

**[Top of page - Repayment table header]**

Rekapitulation der Rückzahlungen

**[Main document text]**

№14725

**Partial-Schuldverschreibung**

über

*Zwanzig Gulden Conventions-Münze im 20 fl. Fusse,*

welche als Antheil an der von mir **Grafen Casimir Esterhazy von Galantha**, k. k. Kämmerer, Herschafts- und Hauptmann-Inhaber in Frágnó et Semptén, bei dem bleibenden k. k. priv. Grosshandelshause **Hammer & Karoly** contralierten Anleihe von **Einer Million gulden Conv-Münze im 20 fl. Fusse** auf 50,000 gleiche Partial-Schuldverschreibungen ausgegeben hierdurah anerkannt werde, daß ich die hier angegebene Summe nebst dem gesetzlichen Rückzahlungsplane augezebten Zeit, mit fünf [percent] jährlichem Zinseszinse während der ganzen Dauer dieser Partial-Schuldverschreibung verzinset werden soll, und daß diese Partial-Schuldverschreibung nach erfolgter Verlosung derselben auf der auch in dem Prospekte angegebenen Zeit, sammt dem darauf entfallenden Betrag mit dem aufgelaufenen Zinsen, bey dem Grundhandlungshause **Hammer & Karoly** in Wien, unanfechtlich jeden Presentanten bezahlt werden wird. Es steht allgenen diese Partial-Schuldverschreibung weder Pfand noch sonstige Sicherheit auf dem Grundhandelshause **Hammer & Karoly** oder ihren Hechsnachfolgern baar angerecht werden. Es steht allgenen diese Partial-Schuldverschreibung weder Pfand noch sonstige Sicherheit auf dem Grundhandlungshause zu; daher jeder Inhaber dieser Partial-Schuldverschreibung sie zu dem in dieser Verlosung angegebenen Kurse, wann sich dieselbe **Wochsen früherer Verfallstag** nicht minder anlegen kann, jederzeit versetzen darf, wenn sich derselbe für Verfallstag nicht minder anlegt.

Zur Vollzugs Beglaubigung unterzeichne ich die, diesem Anleihen als Basis dienende Hauptschuldkunde d. Wien den 6. November 1847 **Einer Million gulden Conv.-Münz.** [k. k.] Herz. Esterhazy Esterhazy **[unclear]**, mathematische und buchförderung Ausweise als: **[unclear]** in Herzogthume Kärnten, Villacher **Weiß-schrift, Pederschein** und **[unclear]** Tarig all: des Portfetorillsten Goggau, Graffl.

---

## English Translation:

**[Top of page - Repayment table header]**

Recapitulation of Repayments

**[Main document text]**

№14725

**Partial Bond Certificate**

for

*Twenty Guilders Conventional Coinage at 20 fl. Standard,*

which, as a share of the loan of **One Million Guilders Conventional Coinage at 20 fl. Standard** contracted by me, **Count Casimir Esterházy of Galantha**, Imperial Royal Chamberlain, Lord and Captain-Proprietor of Frágnó and Semptén, with the established Imperial Royal privileged wholesale house **Hammer & Karoly**, is hereby acknowledged to be issued as one of 50,000 equal partial bond certificates. I acknowledge that I shall repay the sum stated herein, in accordance with the statutory repayment plan, within the period specified, with five percent annual compound interest throughout the entire term of this partial bond certificate, and that upon the drawing of lots of this partial bond certificate, at the time also specified in the prospectus, together with the amount of interest accrued, it shall be paid without objection to every presenter by the wholesale banking house **Hammer & Karoly** in Vienna. This partial bond certificate carries neither mortgage nor other security on the wholesale banking house **Hammer & Karoly** or its legal successors, yet it may be pledged by every holder of this partial bond certificate at the rate specified in this drawing of lots, should he wish to do so prior to the maturity date.

In witness whereof I sign this document, which serves as the basis for this loan, in Vienna on November 6, 1847, **One Million Guilders Conv.-Coinage.** [Imperial Royal] Duke Esterházy Esterházy [unclear], mathematical and book-keeping statements including: [unclear] in the Duchy of Carinthia, Villacher documentation, Pedersen, and [unclear] Tarig, all: of the Portfolio holder Goggan, Count.

# Transcription

## Original (German):

**[Header Table - Multiple columns showing repayment schedule with dates and amounts from 1851-1891]**

**Main Text:**

Hiebei: I. Hitschl, Zeitiker, Zeitiker und Schlittzer der Eisenbahnverwaltung und Fontanell (zusammen 14,963⅜" ), Joch productive Waldhäldern, in deren Eisenbauseiz ve sieben Quadratmeilen), mit alle productiven, anbringungen und Schätzligkeiten für Unterburen, wie solche in dem hochgrat­slietschte Schatzungsproterll vom 26. Juni bis 19. September 1827 verzichtet wurden and verlichen sind; dann meine [drei? Eisenbahnewerke an Hügelhausen bez. III, IV, V und VI, benannt der Holztschätzung und den Gesamtwerk zu Unter-Tawis sammt allergrößigster Eigenschaft in Canalsthale geistslörmlich [unclear], mid mit Rück­sicht auf den Wert der letzteren nicht wir die, einer papillareßsigen Sicherheit gründende Schloß gereich, anders dasselbe überlaupt auch vorstehigi im der Alathe cordwirh würde, um in früherer Fasten meiner Gitter successive zu vermie­...

[The text continues with detailed legal conditions regarding the bond, partial debt obligations (Partial-Schuldverschreibung), hypothetical and exclusion rights, and various administrative clauses]

**Signature Section:**

**Wien, den 15. December 1847.**

[Two signatures visible]
- Werner Noris
- Hoffmann-Berlins

**Countersignature:**

"Gegenwärtige Urkunde ist in den Büchern der gräflichen Central-Casse gehörig eingetragen worden.

*Die gräflich Casimir Esterhazy'sche Central-Casse.*"

[Signature] A. Listán

**[Repayment Schedule Table spanning 1851-1891 with multiple installments and amounts]**

Hereby: I. Hitschl, [title], [titles] of the Railway Administration and Fontanell (together 14,963⅜"), Joch productive forest holdings, in their railway system encompassing seven square miles), with all productive installations and valuations for subordinate properties, as such in the high-district valuation protocol from 26 June to 19 September 1827, have been waived and confirmed; then my [three?] railway works at Hügelhausen resp. III, IV, V and VI, named by the timber valuation and the total work at Unter-Tawis together with the greatest property characteristics in Canal valley [spiritually?] [unclear], and with regard to the value of the latter not we the, one papillary security-based castle [unclear], but rather the same also [supersedes?] in the Alathe cordwork would, in order to in earlier cases of my goods successively...

[Document continues with detailed legal conditions regarding partial debt obligations, hypothetical and exclusion rights, and administrative clauses]

**Signature Location:**

Vienna, 15 December 1847

[Two signatures present]

"This deed has been properly registered in the books of the Gräflich Casimir Esterhazy Central-Casse.

*The Gräflich Casimir Esterhazy'sche Central-Casse*"

transcription:
# USSR Third State Loan for Reconstruction and Development – Conditions

## Original (Russian):

**УСЛОВИЯ ТРЕТЬЕГО ГОСУДАРСТВЕННОГО ЗАЙМА ВОССТАНОВЛЕНИЯ И РАЗВИТИЯ НАРОДНОГО ХОЗЯЙСТВА СССР**

Третий государственный заём восстановления и развития народного хозяйства СССР выпущен на 20 лет — с 1 октября 1948 года по 1 октября 1968 года — в облигациях достоинством в 500, 200, 100, 50 и 25 рублей.

Облигации достоинством в 500 и 200 рублей состоят соответственно из пяти или двух строевых облигаций обной серии и пяти или двух номиналов и дифт лицо на трёх, централизированно подают на каждый из номеров, обозначенных на облигациях.

Облигации достоинством в 50 и 25 рублей являются частями строевых облигаций и виоет лицо расчёту у каждого номером.

Заём делится на раздача на 100 миллионов рублей в раздаде. Никакие раздел состоит из 20000 серии. Серии в каждого раздела имеют номера с № 40001 по № 60000. Облигации в каждой серии имеют номера с № 01 по № 50.

По облигациям займа весь доход выплачивается в виде выигрышей. Выигрыши установлена в размере 50,000, 25,000, 10,000, 5,000, 1,000, 500 и 200 рублей на облигациях в 100 рублей, включая нарицательную стоимость облигаций (это рублей).

В течение двадцатилетнего срока займа выигрывает 1/3 всех облигаций, а остальные 2/3 облигаций погашаются по их нарицательной стоимости. Выигравшая облигация погашается и полностью из ассальнейших тиражей. Общая сумма выигрышей установлена в среднем за двадцатилетний срок займа из расчета 4 процентов в год.

В течение всего срока займа производится 40 тиражей выигрышей—по два тиража ежемесячно.

В тиражах выигравшей на каждый раздел займа, т. е. на каждые 100 миллионов рублей, разыгрывается следующее количество выигрышей:

[TABLE CONTENT - Prize distribution table showing number of winners by prize amount]

**Дополнительные облигации займа подлежатся без переоформления (по их нарицательной стоимости с 1 октября 1953 года в течении 15 лет, остающихся до конца срока займа. Из каждых 100 миллионов рублей займа выплачивается в 1953—1954 гг.—по 2,500,000 рублей, в 1959—1963 гг.—по 4,200,000 рублей в 1964—1968 гг.—6,200,000 рублей ежегодно.**

Облигации займа, подлежащие выкупу в 1953—1967 гг., определяются ежегодными тиражами погашения. Облигации, не выигравшие в тираже погашения, выплачиваются с 1 октября 1968 года.

Облигации, которые дали выигрыши, отличие облигаций, подлежащие выкупу по их нарицательной стоимости, могут быть преобразована для оплаты до 1 октября 1969 года; по истечении этого срока облигации, не преобразиваны к оплате, утрачивают силу и оплате не подлежат.

Облигации займа и выигрыши по ним освобождаются от обложения государственными и местными налогами и сборами.

*Козлоа, 1948.*

---

## English Translation:

**CONDITIONS OF THE THIRD STATE LOAN FOR RECONSTRUCTION AND DEVELOPMENT OF THE NATIONAL ECONOMY OF THE USSR**

The Third State Loan for Reconstruction and Development of the National Economy of the USSR is issued for a period of 20 years—from October 1, 1948 to October 1, 1968—in bonds of the denominations of 500, 200, 100, 50, and 25 rubles.

Bonds of 500 and 200 rubles consist respectively of five or two structural bonds of one series, and five or two nominal values, with a lottery number on each of the numbers designated on the bonds.

Bonds of 50 and 25 rubles are parts of structural bonds and bear lottery numbers.

The loan is divided into distributions of 100 million rubles each. Each distribution consists of 20,000 series. Series in each distribution have numbers from № 40001 to № 60000. Bonds in each series have numbers from № 01 to № 50.

All income on bonds is paid in the form of prize winnings. Prize winnings are established in amounts of 50,000, 25,000, 10,000, 5,000, 1,000, 500, and 200 rubles on bonds of 100 rubles, including the face value of the bonds (in rubles).

During the twenty-year period of the loan, 1/3 of all bonds win prizes, while the remaining 2/3 of bonds are redeemed at their face value. The winning bond is paid in full from subsequent drawings. The total sum of winnings is established at an average of 4 percent per annum over the twenty-year loan period.

During the entire loan period, 40 drawings of prizes are conducted—two drawings each month.

In the drawings of prizes for each distribution of the loan, i.e., for every 100 million rubles, the following quantity of prizes is distributed:

[TABLE CONTENT - Prize distribution by amount and frequency]

**Additional loan bonds are subject to redemption without reissuance at their face value from October 1, 1953 for a period of 15 years, remaining until the end of the loan term. From every 100 million rubles of the loan, payments are made in 1953—1954 of 2,500,000 rubles, in 1959—1963 of 4,200,000 rubles, and in 1964—1968 of 6,200,000 rubles annually.**

Loan bonds subject to redemption in 1953—1967 are determined by annual redemption drawings. Bonds that did not win in the redemption drawing are paid on October 1, 1968.

Bonds that received prize winnings, except bonds subject to redemption at their face value, may be presented for payment until October 1, 1969; after expiration of this period, bonds not presented for payment lose their validity and are not subject to payment.

Loan bonds and winnings on them are exempt from taxation by state and local taxes and fees.

*Kozlov, 1948.*

---

transcription:
# SECOND NATIONALIST GOVERNMENT LOTTERY LOAN
## OF THE
### FIFTEENTH YEAR OF THE REPUBLIC OF CHINA, BEING THE YEAR 1926.
#### BOND FOR FIVE DOLLARS, CANTON CURRENCY.

The Regulation of the Lottery Loan for financing the construction of the Port of Whampoa was sanctioned by the Nationalist Government Mandate of the 25th June, 1926.

A summary of the said Regulations appears below:—

**Amount issued:—** $10,000,000.
**Denomination:—** $5.
**Security:—** The loan is secured on the revenue of the Nationalist Government, and the Central Bank of China, which is the Government Depository, unconditionally guarantees the payment of prizes and the repayment of principal at maturity.

**Repayment:—** The loan is repaid in thirty monthly instalments, without interest.
- 1st to 10th month 2½ of the bonds are drawn each month.
- 11th " 20th " 3% " " " "
- 21st " 30th " 3½ " " " "

Public drawings for prizes are held on the 5th day of each month, at the General Chamber of Commerce, Canton, and directly after the winning numbers are drawn a second drawing will be made from the said winning numbers for the awarding of prizes.

The following prizes will be drawn each month:—
- 1 First Prize......................... $ 50,000.— | 50 Sixth Prizes, each $ 30............ $ 1,500.—
- 2 Second Prizes, each $ 2,000...... $ 4,000.— | 100 Seventh " " $ 15............. $ 1,500.—
- 5 Third, " $ 500............. $ 2,500.— | 300 Eighth " " $ 10............. $ 3,000.—
- 10 Fourth, " $ 100............. $ 1,000.— | 600 Ninth " " $ 5.............. $ 3,000.—
- 20 Fifth, " $ 50............... $ 1,000.—

All bonds, which have been drawn for repayment of principal, can be used as security for loans at 50 cents each, in addition to the repayment of principal.

Drawn Bonds should be presented to the Central Bank of China, Canton, for repayment of principal and payment of prizes five days after the drawing, and not later than three months thereafter.

**Use of Goods:—** The Bonds are transferable, and may be bought, sold or mortgaged, or used as security or reserve fund for public transactions.

Dated the 1st day of the 8th Month of the 15th Year of the Republic of China, being the 1st of August, 1926.
